steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content:
In the line of best fit
$$y=0.096x-0.488$$
the slope is $0.096$.

steps.title: Interpret the units
steps.content: The slope gives the predicted change in minimum wage for each $1$-year increase in $x$. So the model predicts an average increase of $0.096$ dollars each year, not the intercept. The answer is A.
